title: 자동차 수출, 월간 50만대 돌파
summary: 한국 자동차 수출량이 세계 수요 회복으로 월간 50만대를 처음으로 돌파했습니다.
content: Korean automobile exports exceeded 500,000 units monthly. Electric vehicles led the export growth significantly. The North American market showed the strongest demand. Hybrid car sales also reached new records. Major automakers expanded production capacity. Industry analysts predict continued growth trajectory. Trade surplus in automotive sector widened further. Supply chain issues have been mostly resolved. New export contracts with European companies were signed. Government incentives for green vehicles boosted sales. The achievement marks a milestone for Korean auto industry.
